lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant wear and damage. Multiple mechanical and electrical systems are currently non-functional and require extensive repair.
The car is in poor condition. It has significant cosmetic damage to the exterior and heavy wear on the interior. It requires major mechanical repairs to be safe and operational.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep luster and absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained, stored in a climate-controlled garage, and comes with a complete, documented service history. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor, offering the highest level of reliability and aesthetic appeal available on the market.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a car back to its former glory. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work, it serves as a great, affordable foundation for a dedicated project or a source for valuable parts. If you love a challenge and have the vision to restore it, this could be the start of your next great automotive adventure!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been a dependable daily driver, though it clearly shows its age. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with several minor scratches and a small dent on the passenger door. Inside, the upholstery is worn, particularly on the driver's seat, and there are some permanent stains on the floor mats. Mechan

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit offers a refined driving experience and represents an exceptional value proposition within its class. We invite you to experience the reliability and performance of this well-preserved specimen.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car. I've absolutely loved driving this beauty and it has been so incredibly reliable for me! It’s in really solid shape—runs like a dream and looks fantastic both inside and out. It’s got a few minor signs of love from its time on the road, but honestly, it still feels so smooth and is totally ready for its next big adventure. I'm looking for a happy new home for it, so feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all!

This E46 M3 is powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. The 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox provides precise shift action, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Significant mechanical upkeep includes a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed VANOS system, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within spec. The suspension geometry remains tight, offering the communicative steering feel and balanced handling characteristics this chassis is known for. A mechanically sound, driver-spec machine with robust internals and a clean power band.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well maintained. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and features premium upholstery that remains supple and supportive, showing minimal signs of aging. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread life remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, function exactly as they should. This is a turn-key car ready for its next owner to drive home today.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring a driving experience that balances refined performance with steadfast reliability. Its condition reflects attentive stewardship, offering a sophisticated choice for the discerning motorist who values both prestige and long-term utility. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to meet our professional benchmarks for road-ready excellence.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional care, the automobile remains in superior mechanical and aesthetic order. It offers a refined driving experience and structural integrity that reflects a legacy of diligent ownership. We invite you to experience this synthesis of performance and reliability firsthand.

Hey there! I'm looking for a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, ready for many more adventures. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and has been really well-loved. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make its next owner very happy!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox offers precise throws, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes reinforced rear subframe mounting points and a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul, ensuring the valvetrain remains within factory tolerances. The chassis retains its signature balance with a 50/50 weight distribution, complemented by a sharp hydraulic steering rack that provides exceptional road feel. While showing some honest patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is robust, featuring upgraded bushings and a firm suspension profile that minimizes body roll under high lateral G-loads.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.
